5+ locations

GTV tiers are proxied — location count is the primary driver, then review count for single-location businesses (≥25 reviews = $300k+, ≥60 = $500k+, ≥100 = $1M–$2M). ~95% of accounts are single-location, so treat tiers as a relative activity/quality signal, not measured revenue.

Account Volume by Bucket

Distribution Shape (% of each vertical)

Estimated Total Portfolio GTV by Vertical

Sum of (midpoint × account count) per vertical. Relative sizing only — not measured revenue.
